blueprint_yaml:
name: calculate_property_price
steps:
  - name: calculate_area
    brick: multiply
    params:
      a: 7.5
      b: 4.2
    save_as: area_result
  - name: round_area
    brick: round_value
    params:
      value: "${area_result.result}"
      decimals: 2
    save_as: rounded_area
  - name: calculate_base_price
    brick: multiply
    params:
      a: "${rounded_area.result}"
      b: 3500.0
    save_as: base_price_result
  - name: calculate_tax
    brick: multiply
    params:
      a: "${base_price_result.result}"
      b: 0.17
    save_as: tax_result
  - name: calculate_total
    brick: add
    params:
      a: "${base_price_result.result}"
      b: "${tax_result.result}"
    save_as: total_result
  - name: format_total
    brick: format_result
    params:
      label: "Total (EUR)"
      value: "${total_result.result}"
    save_as: formatted_total
outputs_map:
  total: "${total_result.result}"
  display_string: "${formatted_total}"
